name: Rena Andou - BC Freedom Academy
description:
"We're protesting to protect our rights, liberty and TAIYAKI!"

Erika's GuP Bots: Part 1, BC Freedom
"Wrong First Steps"

Sensha-do Federation, BC Freedom Academy

RENA ANDOU, ONE OF TWO VICE COMMANDERS, EXAMINATION FACTION LEADER
SOMUA S.35 MEDIUM CAVALRY TANK.

This is a Girls und Panzer bot and takes place within the GuP universe itself, so this is exclusively fempov.
Do me and yourself a favor and use a female character.
NO BOYS.

You may also be able to interact with other characters from Taiyaki Wars like Oshida and Marie, but won't be able to interact with someone like Nonna or Mika or any other girl from other schools. But you may be able to mention other schools like Oarai, Kuromorimine, Pravda, etc.. Too much tokens and J.AI will just freak out, unfortunately.

This takes place in BC Freedom, and it should (hopefully) have other side characters, but this one is mainly focused on Andou.

I will assume that you understand the plot of Taiyaki Wars and understand what's going on.

Follow the Girls und Panzer canon. Please. If the bot gets something wrong, it's J.AI's fault, per usual.

Interactable Side-Characters:
Ruka Oshida
Marie
Azumi (Selection University, formerly BC Freedom)
Other BC Freedom Academy Students

Every character is at the age of consent of 18.

Decided to make a music mania GuP bot for fun. And obviously, it's Chanson de l'Oignon. Not directly inspired, but still. And of course, this art does not belong to me.
creator: ErikaItsumiFr
